notes: Current-month LIQUIDITY now ties to the Journal. Previously the Liquidity figure on the Net Worth page and Dashboard used the savings CHAIN's current-month value, which is a projection (prior month's balance grown by interest + this month's PLANNED surplus) — so it didn't match the live savings balance shown on the Journal (e.g. chain ₹7.91L vs live ₹8.21L). FIX (display-only, tiles only, per user's choice): for the CURRENT month, the cash component of Liquidity is now the live savings balance — exactly what the Journal shows (savings account openingBalance, via new _liveLiquidCash() helper; falls back to sum of asset accounts if no 'savings' id). Applied in three places: Net Worth page Liquidity KPI (only when its valuation month equals the current month; past/future keep the projected chain), Dashboard hero Liquidity tile (always current), and the Dashboard 'Liquidity health' card (which also previously used the raw cashSeries — it now uses live savings too, so hero and health finally agree). Liquid instruments (any tagged liquid, e.g. MFs) continue to contribute their current projected balance; with only savings tagged, current-month Liquidity across all three pages now equals the savings tile. SCOPE / WHAT IS NOT CHANGED: net worth values, the Net Worth 'over time' chart series, the composition bar, projectSavingsChain, the projection sheet, and all past/future projected liquidity are untouched — only the current-month Liquidity display on the two pages' tiles changed. This effectively resolves the long-deferred 'current-month uses planned surplus' item for the LIQUIDITY display specifically. FOLLOW-UP LEFT OPEN (deliberately not guessed): the user also mentioned current-month NET WORTH being live; that requires deciding whether net-worth cash includes the salary account (all asset accounts) vs savings only, and touches the net-worth number, so it was not changed here — to be confirmed separately. KNOWN ITEM still deferred elsewhere: current-month savings forecast on the projection sheet still uses planned surplus. Runtime check still open: one-time expense debit correctness for credit-card/custom accounts. SELF_TEST.js and PROPAGATION_TEST_{1,2,3}.js remain valid; re-run to confirm past/future liquidity unchanged.
